summary.status: exploratory; excluded from canonical method selection/export

interpretation.fd_only: No training and direct local NGSpice accuracy; best for a one-time small device set, but each objective evaluation invokes NGSpice and each new device needs another solve.
interpretation.foundation: One differentiable model is reusable across the 18 conditioned training geometries and supports large parallel inverse searches; it has substantial upfront training/cache cost, can blur geometry-specific behavior, still requires NGSpice validation/FD, and this split does not establish generalization to an unseen geometry.
interpretation.per_device_emulators: Usually easier to fit accurately for one geometry but require one training run and one model artifact per transistor.

devices.selection_policy: one shared emulator and one fixed recipe across all 18
